data.title: Littera Education introduces new data collection product to improve analysis of tutoring programs. (Characters: 91)
data.description: On January 28, 2026, Littera Education, a prominent provider of effective tutoring services and technology solutions, revealed its latest product aimed at tackling the common issue of acquiring reliable and comparable data for evaluating the efficacy of tutoring programs. This new offering is poised to revolutionize the industry by providing a comprehensive solution to the challenges faced in assessing tutoring program delivery and calculating the return on investment.

data.title: Dow Jones index fluctuates ahead of Fed Powell's comments; Gold price surges on Trump news. Tesla earnings expected soon.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index showed uncertainty as investors awaited the Federal Reserve decisions and comments from Powell. Tesla is set to report its earnings later. Gold prices surged following news related to Trump. The stock market experienced fluctuations as the day progressed, with many eyes on these key events. Stay updated for more developments.

data.title: Decagon's valuation triples to $4.5B with $250M Series D funding from investors like Coatue Management and Index Ventures.
data.description: Decagon, a top company in conversational AI agents specializing in concierge customer experiences, has revealed today its new funding milestone. The latest Series D funding round has secured an impressive $250 million, primarily led by prominent new investors Coatue Management and Index Ventures. Moreover, additional support from new investors such as ChemistryVC, Definition Capital, and Starwood Capital has significantly contributed to this funding success. Existing investors like a16z, A*, Accel, Avra, Bain Capital Ventures, Elad Gil, T.Capital, Forerunner, and Ribbit Capital have also continued their backing. This funding round marks a remarkable triple increase for Decagon.

data.title: CrowdStrike named Customers’ Choice in Gartner's 2026 Endpoint Protection Platforms report based on 97% Willingness to Recommend score from 800 responses.
data.description: CrowdStrike, traded as CRWD on NASDAQ, recently revealed its recognition as the Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights™ ‘Voice of the Customer’ for Endpoint Protection Platforms report. This acknowledgment comes on the heels of the company achieving the highest number of 5-star ratings among all Customers’ Choice vendors, boasting an impressive 97% Willingness to Recommend score. This achievement is based on a substantial 800 responses received as of November 2025. Noteworthy is the fact that CrowdStrike stands out as the sole vendor consistently named a Customers’ Choice in every edition of the Voice of the Customer for Endpoint Protection Platforms.
Charles Schwab Chief FI strategist Jones: Statement may have some adjustment to inflation.

data.title: In Jan 2026, Parker Foot and Ankle in collaboration with Regenative Labs published a case series on addressing ligamentous defects.
data.description: In a recent press release dated January 28, 2026, Parker Foot and Ankle based in Houston and Pensacola, Florida, under the leadership of foot and ankle expert Robert Parker, DPM, FACFAS, FAENS, revealed a new development in partnership with Regenative Labs. The announcement highlights the release of a peer-reviewed case series that outlines a comprehensive, multimodal approach to foot and ankle care.

data.title: Hartford HealthCare Cancer Institute named first MSK Care Partner in U.S, per Jan 28, 2026 news - milestone achievement.
data.description: In a groundbreaking development, Hartford HealthCare Cancer Institute in Hartford, Connecticut, has made history by being recognized as the inaugural healthcare system in the United States to earn the distinction of becoming a Care Partner of Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center (MSK Care Partner). This prestigious designation underscores a significant milestone in the healthcare sector, emphasizing enhanced collaboration and specialized care.

data.title: Neinor Homes approved to launch tender offer for 100% of AEDAS shares at €24.00 per share by CNMV.
data.description: Neinor Homes, the top residential developer in Spain, has received authorization from the Spanish Securities Market Commission (CNMV) to proceed with its latest project. This approval marks a significant milestone for Neinor, as it solidifies their position in the market. The exact numbers involved in this authorization process have not been disclosed officially.

data.title: Gemini 3 now default AI model for Google Search globally, facilitating smooth switch from AI Overviews to conversational AI Mode.
data.description: The popular search engine Google has implemented an upgrade to its Search functionality by introducing Gemini 3 as the standard AI model on a global scale. This advancement allows for smooth switching between AI Overviews and conversational AI Mode. Users can now experience enhanced search capabilities with this latest development.

data.title: Inventor from Las Vegas creates new multitool (BEC-531) for elevator technicians to open doors, make connections, and more.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 28, 2026, an inventor from Las Vegas, Nevada, shared his innovative creation of a multitool designed for elevator repair professionals. The tool, called the PICK, serves various functions such as opening and wedging doors, making wire connections, illuminating dark hoist ways, and facilitating note-taking. This versatile gadget caters to the specific needs of elevator maintenance workers, offering enhanced functionality in their daily tasks.

data.title: ePayPolicy named 2026 leader by Gartner in multiple categories, with high customer satisfaction.
data.description: ePayPolicy, a leader in the digital payments sector for insurance in Austin, Texas, received top customer ratings from Gartner Digital Markets, showcasing its exceptional customer satisfaction and market leadership. The recognition on Jan. 28, 2026, emphasizes the company's strong position with satisfied customers.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum cautious as they trade range-bound, with low-conviction sentiment. NUPL shifted from belief to anxiety. (characters: 127)
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) are commencing the first quarter with a reserved outlook following a period of trading within set ranges. The recent report "Charting Crypto Q1" by Glassnode and Coinbase Institutional indicated that Bitcoin is currently in a phase of low-confidence sentiment. The Net Unrealized Profit/Loss (NUPL) indicator moved from a belief stance to anxiety during a liquidation event in October. This change typically corresponds with consolidation periods in historical terms. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: XRP Community Day 2026 on Feb 11 with Garlinghouse, Long to cover ETFs, tokenization, and wrapped XRP in 3 sessions.
data.description: The XRP Community Day 2026 by Ripple (XRP) showcased CEO Brad Garlinghouse and President Monica Long engaging in discussions on ETFs, tokenization, and wrapped XRP during three international sessions.

data.title: EDO launches EDO Always-On for automated TV outcomes measurement, expands platform to deliver data to media partners.
data.description: In New York, EDO, a TV outcomes firm, introduced EDO Always-On, a new cross-platform measurement solution aimed at providing automated, scaled performance data directly to media partners’ exclusive data systems. The new feature expands EDO’s existing measurement of TV and converged campaigns, offering continuous outcomes reporting for all brands and categories across premium video platforms. EDO Always-On signifies the realization of EDO’s long-term goal to increase its scale and reach in the industry.

data.title: MKS prices private offering of €1 billion 4.250% senior notes due 2034, expected to close on Feb 4.
data.description: In Andover, Massachusetts on January 28, 2026, MKS Inc. (NASDAQ: MKSI) disclosed the pricing details of its private offering, consisting of €1.0 billion aggregate principal amount in 4.250% senior notes due 2034. Expected to conclude on February 4, 2026, the offering is contingent upon meeting standard closing prerequisites.

data.title: Hospitality, media, and sports giants join effort against human trafficking before Super Bowl LX in San Francisco. NFL Ambassadors support It's a Penalty campaign. #EndHumanTrafficking.
data.description: A campaign called It's a Penalty Super Bowl LX is leveraging sports to raise awareness and equip the public in fighting human trafficking. The initiative kicked off its 23rd global campaign in the San Francisco Bay Area, California on January 28, 2026.
